page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9i.12xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, utilizing an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. The instance is configured with 96.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server type does not include local storage, requiring external network-attached storage options for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps. There are no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this configuration.

With a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.c9i.12xlarge is optimized for compute-intensive workloads where processing power is prioritized over memory capacity. This resource profile offers qualitative cost efficiency for high-compute tasks by avoiding the expense of unutilized memory. It is suited for workloads such as batch processing, compute-heavy web serving, and CPU-bound application servers.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9i.12xlarge is a compute-optimized x86_64 server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 48 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.2 GHz, with a single thread per core. The hardware configuration provides 96.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 2.0 GB per core. This instance does not feature local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps. Designed for compute-heavy workloads, the ecs.c9i.12xlarge offers a resource-dense profile that maximizes CPU allocation while minimizing memory overhead, making it highly suitable for batch processing and compute-intensive application hosting.
